new_entries_search: |  append      [|  inputlookup cip_network_configs | eval Action="Add" | eval port_enabled="true" | append      [ |  inputlookup cip_network_configs | eval Action="Add" | eval port_enabled="disabled" ] | dedup port_id,port_enabled sortby port_id | fields port_id,port_enabled,Action ]
| append [ search `get_os_datasources` | eval operating_system=OS | search operating_system=* | eval Action="Add" | fields operating_system,Action ]

| append [ search sourcetype="Script:InstalledApps" | eval name=replace(DisplayName, "\"", ""),publisher=replace(Publisher, "\"", ""),version=replace(DisplayVersion, "\"", "") | fillnull publisher, version value="NA" | lookup vendor_lookup match_string as publisher OUTPUTNEW vendor  | eval software_type=if(vendor="NoMatch" AND vendor!=publisher, "Custom", "Commercial")  | eval publisher=if(vendor="NoMatch", publisher, vendor)  | search name=*  | fillnull vendor value="NA"  | eval Action="Add" | fields name,publisher,version,software_type,Action ]

|  append      [search sourcetype=WinHostMon Type=Service  | eval name=replace(DisplayName, "\"", ""), start_mode="Automatic"  | dedup name,start_mode  | append      [ search sourcetype=WinHostMon Type=Service      | eval name=replace(DisplayName, "\"", ""), start_mode="Manual"      | dedup name,start_mode     | fields name,start_mode ]  | append      [ search sourcetype=WinHostMon Type=Service      | eval name=replace(DisplayName, "\"", ""), start_mode="Disabled"      | dedup name,start_mode     | fields name,start_mode ]  | eval Action="Add" | fields name,start_mode,Action ]
